data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. MISS CLARENCE put in a much better performance last start when in the placings at this track behind Blue Tiara (17.92) in a Grade 5. Has the pace to be prominent. Must come into calculations. 3. SHE'S A PANAMA has a strong record this track and trip including two wins from four starts. Below best last time at this track (18.30) in a Grade 5, finishing a 10 length sixth. Looks one of the chances. 2. LITTLE WHACKER produced a modest effort most recently when seventh at this track over 300m behind Mulwee Princess (18.43) in a Grade 5. One of the main contenders. 4. FLYING MINTER should be thereabouts despite an unplaced run here most recently.","runners":[1,3,2,4],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: TAREE-R7-Fav Out
